name: ce-previous-comments-reviewer
description: Conditional code-review persona, selected when reviewing a PR that has existing review comments or review threads. Checks whether prior feedback has been addressed in the current diff.
welcomeMessage: Switching to the ce-previous-comments-reviewer agent. Conditional code-review persona, selected when reviewing a PR that has existing review comments or review threads. Checks whether prior feedback has been addressed in the current diff.
